title: WP_PAGE_2144_LASER_LED_B_TRANSLATION_2026-06-05.md
text:
# WP Page 2144 Laser LED B Translation - 2026-06-05

## Scope
- Page: `https://www.skinharmony.it/laser-led-b/`
- WordPress post ID: `2144`
- Languages: `en`, `fr`, `de`, `es`
- Method: SkinHarmony Core Translator REST workflow with Core Codex Connector gate.

## Core / Nyra Gate
- Action type: `publish`
- Verdict: `ALLOWED`
- Risk: `low`
- Owner confirmation: `false`
- Report: `reports/codex-core/codex_core_gate_latest.json`

## Translation Run
- Provider status: OK
- Provider: `openai`
- Model: `gpt-4.1-mini`
- Page strings extracted: `95`
- Batch command: `SH_TRANSLATE_LANGS=en,fr,de,es SH_TRANSLATE_BLOCK_SIZE=10 node scripts/translate_wp_site_stepwise.js 2144`
- Batch report: `reports/wp_site_translation_stepwise_2026-06-05.json`
- Result: `95/95` generated for each target language.

## Review Approval
- `en`: `95` approved, pending count after workflow `0`
- `fr`: `95` approved, pending count after workflow `0`
- `de`: `95` approved, pending count after workflow `0`
- `es`: `95` approved, pending count after workflow `0`

Review approvals were executed in small batches through `review/approve`, scoped to `object_id=2144`, to avoid timeout on full-language bundle transitions.

## Runtime Verification
Sample runtime lookups returned translated text for the page headline, lead and CTA.

Source:
`Laser LED B: epilazione professionale Made in Italy per centri beauty evoluti.`

- EN: `Laser LED B: professional hair removal Made in Italy for advanced beauty centers.`
- FR: `Laser LED B: épilation professionnelle Made in Italy pour centres de beaute évolués.`
- DE: `Laser LED B: professionelle Haarentfernung Made in Italy für fortschrittliche Beauty-Zentren.`
- ES: `Laser LED B: depilación profesional Made in Italy para centros de belleza avanzados.`

Source:
`Richiedi informazioni`

- EN: `Request information`
- FR: `Demander des informations`
- DE: `Information anfordern`
- ES: `Solicitar información`

## Public Route Verification
- `https://www.skinharmony.it/en/laser-led-b/`: `200`
- `https://www.skinharmony.it/fr/laser-led-b/`: `200`
- `https://www.skinharmony.it/de/laser-led-b/`: `200`
- `https://www.skinharmony.it/es/laser-led-b/`: `200`

Checked Italian residuals:
- Italian headline sample absent on all four public language routes.
- Italian CTA `Richiedi informazioni` absent on all four public language routes.
- Runtime headline and CTA translation samples found in public HTML for all four public language routes.
- One long French lead sample did not match exact raw text in HTML, likely due to HTML/punctuation normalization; the Italian source sample was absent and runtime lookup was correct.

## Boundaries
- Italian source content was not modified.
- No price changes.
- No numeric technical specification changes.
- No plugin code changes.
- No tenant, key, checkout, CRM or customer data changes.
